uiBuilder.label: D3 Network Graph
uiBuilder.description: A configurable force-directed network graph rendered with D3.js. Nodes are entities (e.g. CMDB configuration items) colored by group and sized by value; links show relationships, optionally directed with arrowheads. Interactive hover highlighting of neighbors, draggable nodes, tooltips, and click/hover events. Restyle it entirely from the property panel.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · Graph
properties.description: Graph object: { nodes: [ { id, label, group, value, color } ], links: [ { source, target, value } ] }. Link source/target reference a node id (or index). Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Chart background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the chart in pixels.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for chart text. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate the graph settling into place on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the live settling animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve hint for the settling animation.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Emphasize a node and its connected links on mouse-over.

properties.name: hoverDimOthers
properties.label: Display · Dim others on hover
properties.description: Fade unconnected nodes and links while hovering a node.

properties.name: chargeStrength
properties.label: Layout · Charge strength
properties.description: Many-body force strength. Negative values repel nodes (spread the graph out); positive values attract. More negative = more spacing.

properties.name: linkDistance
properties.label: Layout · Link distance (px)
properties.description: Target resting length of each link, in pixels.

properties.name: collidePadding
properties.label: Layout · Collision padding (px)
properties.description: Extra space added around each node's radius for collision avoidance, in pixels.

properties.name: simulationTicks
properties.label: Layout · Settle iterations
properties.description: How many simulation iterations to run synchronously before drawing, so a stable layout renders immediately. Higher = more settled (and slower).

properties.name: nodeRadius
properties.label: Nodes · Radius (px)
properties.description: Base circle radius for nodes, in pixels. Used when not sizing by a value field.

properties.name: nodeRadiusField
properties.label: Nodes · Size by field
properties.description: Name of a numeric field on each node used to scale its radius (e.g. "value"). Blank = uniform radius. Falls back to node.value when values are present.

properties.name: nodeMinRadius
properties.label: Nodes · Min radius (px)
properties.description: Smallest node radius when sizing by a value field.

properties.name: nodeMaxRadius
properties.label: Nodes · Max radius (px)
properties.description: Largest node radius when sizing by a value field.

properties.name: linkWidth
properties.label: Links · Width (px)
properties.description: Stroke width of links, in pixels. Used when not scaling by a value field.

properties.name: linkWidthField
properties.label: Links · Width by field
properties.description: Name of a numeric field on each link used to scale its width (e.g. "value"). Blank = uniform width.

properties.name: linkColor
properties.label: Links · Color
properties.description: Stroke color of links.

properties.name: linkOpacity
properties.label: Links · Opacity
properties.description: Opacity of links, 0 (transparent) to 1 (opaque).

properties.name: directed
properties.label: Links · Directed (arrowheads)
properties.description: Draw arrowheads at the target end of each link to show direction.

properties.name: showLabels
properties.label: Labels · Show node labels
properties.description: Draw a text label next to each node.

properties.name: labelField
properties.label: Labels · Label field
properties.description: Node field used for the label text (e.g. "label" or "id"). Falls back to id when blank/missing.

properties.name: labelFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Font size (px)
properties.description: Font size of node labels, in pixels.

properties.name: labelColor
properties.label: Labels · Color
properties.description: Text color of node labels.

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Color scheme
properties.description: Categorical color scale that maps a node's group to a color. "Custom palette" uses the colors below; the others are built-in D3 schemes. An explicit node.color always overrides the scheme.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip over each node.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {label}, {id}, {group}, {value}, {degree}, {swatch} (a color dot for the node), {color}, and any custom key on the node. Interpolated values are HTML-escaped.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Turn off to anchor it near the hovered node. Either way it's clamped within the chart bounds.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the chart background (not a specific node).

actions.name: NODE_CLICKED
actions.label: Node clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks an individual node. Use to drill into details for that CI/entity.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Node label
payload.description: Display label of the clicked node.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: Numeric value of the clicked node (null when absent).

payload.name: degree
payload.label: Degree
payload.description: Number of links incident to the node.

actions.name: NODE_HOVERED
actions.label: Node hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a node. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Node label
payload.description: Display label of the hovered node.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: Numeric value of the hovered node (null when absent).
